boundary: Finite ASH branch measure only; no Hilbert-space dynamics, no physical probability calibration, no decoherence rule, no bridge to observables, and no empirical validation.

law_summary.boundary: Finite ASH branch-frontier measure only; no Born-rule proof, no Hilbert-space dynamics, no collapse/decoherence rule, no physical spacetime bridge, and no empirical validation.

law_summary.normalization: For each finite sibling set with at least one child, sum_c pi(c|parent)=1 and sum_c mu(c)=mu(parent).
law_summary.title: ASH Roadmap 008 finite branch measure law
